items.title: Follow up with Barak Perelman on US Bank meeting outcome
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on May 10: 'BTW I'm meeting David @ US Bank on Tue Morning' — check how it went and whether there's a potential LP intro opportunity.

items.title: Follow up with Simone on Prism Layer materials for review
items.context: Jake asked Simone on Apr 28: 'can you please share the materials for our review?' and bumped again on May 8. Materials may still be pending.

items.title: Prep for in-person meeting with Simone Garreau on May 26
items.context: In-person meeting + Zoom scheduled at Fin Capital offices (1 Sansome St, SF) on May 26 at 10:30am PT with Logan, Jake, Derek, and Claire.

items.title: Follow up with Roy Katmor on Orchid fundraise status after travel window
items.context: Email from roy@orchid.security on May 6: 'We passed on a TS this week as the terms didn't align... Travel over the next two weeks will slow things down a bit, but we're making good progress. I'll keep you updated.'

items.title: Document takeaways from today's Blast Security meeting with Boris
items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: Fin Capital <> Blast Security' on May 14 at 9:30am ET with Richie, Boris (blast.security), and Derek.

items.title: Check in on Hitachi Ventures intro progress for IndyKite
items.context: Derek introduced Lasse Andresen to Gayathri at Hitachi Ventures on May 13. Lasse responded same day noting 11 VC firms reviewing, 1 draft TS on table, PoCs with HSBC/Barclays/Nomura.

items.title: Prep for Reach Security follow-up meeting — review round dynamics, competitive landscape, Microsoft partnership, and FinServ sales motion
items.context: Calendar event '[ZOOM] Follow-up: Reach Security <> Fin Capital' on May 14 with Garrett, Mike, Colt, Logan, Derek, Fan. Agenda: round dynamics, competitive advantages, Microsoft channel partnership, sales motion into financial services.

items.title: Prep for Dome Systems intro meeting with Fan
items.context: Calendar event 'Dome Systems <> Fin Capital' on May 14 at 1:30pm ET with davemcj@domesystems.ai, Fan, and Derek via Zoom.
